SELECT toDateOrZero(date_string) AS conversion_result FROM dates_test;
CREATE TABLE dates_aggregated AS SELECT toDateOrZero(date_string) AS converted_date FROM dates_test;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dates_aggregated WHERE converted_date = toDateOrZero('');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dates_aggregated WHERE converted_date = toDateOrZero('invalid_date');
SELECT toDateOrZero(date_string) AS conversion_result, COUNT(*) FROM dates_test GROUP BY conversion_result;

SELECT a.date_string, b.date_string, toDateOrZero(a.date_string) AS converted_date_a, toDateOrZero(b.date_string) AS converted_date_b FROM dates_test AS a JOIN dates_test AS b ON a.date_string <> b.date_string;
SELECT toDateOrZero(a.date_string) AS a_converted, toDateOrZero(b.invalid_date) AS b_converted FROM dates_test AS a JOIN other_dates AS b ON a.date_string = b.invalid_date;
